name: Fabege AB (publ)
summary: Fabege AB (publ), a property company, focuses primarily on the development and management of commercial premises in Sweden. It operates through Property Management, Property Development, and Transactions segments. The company's property portfolio comprises office, retail, industrial/warehouse, residential, hotel, and garage properties. It owns 94 properties with a total lettable area of 1,245,000 square meters. The company was formerly known as Wihlborgs Fastigheter AB and changed its name to Fabege AB (publ) in December 2005. Fabege AB (publ) was founded in 1924 and is headquartered in Solna, Sweden.
